name: Talon

basic_attack.calculation_notes: Basic-attack timing values are sourced from From Online stats payload.

passive.name: Blade's End
passive.description_source: Innate: Each time  Talon's  abilities deal physical damage to  champions and large  monsters, they apply a stack of Wound, stacking up to a cap.

effects.description: Innate: Talon's abilities apply a stack of Wound to enemy champions and large monsters hit for 6 seconds, refreshing on basic attacks and subsequent applications and stacking up to 3 times.

Talon's next basic attack against an enemy with 3 Wound stacks is empowered to consume them all to cause the target to bleed, dealing[ 80 : 303.53 (based on level) (+ 210% bonus AD) total physical damage ][ 5 : 18.97 (based on level) (+ 13.125% bonus AD) physical damage every 0.125 seconds ]over 2 seconds. The target cannot gain Wound stacks during this time.

passive.description: Innate: Talon's abilities apply a stack of Wound to enemy champions and large monsters hit for 6 seconds, refreshing on basic attacks and subsequent applications and stacking up to 3 times.
context_notes: Source notes (summary): Blade End's enhanced attack will still trigger if blocked, but not if they are dodged or missed while Talon is blinded.

basic_ability_1.name: Noxian Diplomacy
basic_ability_1.description_source: Active:  Talon  leaps to the target enemy, dealing physical damage. If the target is within melee range, Talon instead  critically strikes the target.

effects.context_notes: Active: Talon dashes toward the target enemy, stabbing the target upon arrival to deal physical damage.
Active: Talon dashes toward the target enemy, stabbing the target upon arrival to deal physical damage.

effects.description: If Noxian Diplomacy kills the target, Talon heals for 9 : 55 (based on level) and the ability's cooldown is reduced by 50%.
Noxian Diplomacy resets Talon's basic attack timer. Shadow Assault can be cast during the dash.

basic_ability_1.description: Active: Talon dashes toward the target enemy, stabbing the target upon arrival to deal physical damage. If cast within close range, Talon dashes to the target over the cast time instead and Noxian Diplomacy critically strikes for (150% + 30%) damage, as well as grants him 75 bonus attack range on his next basic attack within 1 second.
context_notes: Source castTime: None / 100% of Talon's windup time (0.198 at base attack speed).
Source notes (summary): Talon will track the target if they change locations with the ranged version of Noxian Diplomacy, landing at an offset of 100 units before reaching them.

basic_ability_2.name: Rake
basic_ability_2.description_source: Active:  Talon throws a fan of daggers in the target direction that deals physical damage to enemies hit.

effects.context_notes: Active: Talon throws a fan of daggers in a cone in the target direction that deals physical damage to enemies hit.
At maximum range, the daggers linger for 0.
At maximum range, the daggers linger for 0.
At maximum range, the daggers linger for 0.

effects.description: Enemies can be hit only once per pass.

basic_ability_2.description: Active: Talon throws a fan of daggers in a cone in the target direction that deals physical damage to enemies hit.
context_notes: Source notes (summary): This ability will cast from wherever the caster is at the end of the cast time.

basic_ability_3.name: Assassin's Path
basic_ability_3.description_source: Active:  Talon  vaults over the target terrain.

effects.description: Active: Talon dashes up to 800 units over the target area of terrain while within proximity of it, during which he gains unobstructed vision.
Talon cannot cast Assassin's Path on the same area of terrain for a set duration.
Shadow Assault can be cast during the dash.

basic_ability_3.description: Active: Talon dashes up to 800 units over the target area of terrain while within proximity of it, during which he gains unobstructed vision.
context_notes: Source notes (summary): When Assassin's Path is cast on terrain that is out of range, Talon will walk to the location where he is able to cast the ability and dash over this area of terrain.

ultimate.name: Shadow Assault
ultimate.description_source: Active:  Talon disperses a ring of blades around him that deals physical damage to enemies it passes through and lingers for a short time, during which he gains  invisibility and  bonus move speed.

effects.context_notes: Active: Talon disperses a ring of blades around him that deals physical damage to enemies hit and lingers at maximum range for up to 2.
Active: Talon disperses a ring of blades around him that deals physical damage to enemies hit and lingers at maximum range for up to 2.

effects.description: Shadow Assault can be recast after 1 second within the duration, and does so automatically after the duration or if Talon breaks stealth.

effects.context_notes: Recast: Talon breaks stealth and converges the blades to him, dealing the same physical damage to enemies hit.

ultimate.description: Active: Talon disperses a ring of blades around him that deals physical damage to enemies hit and lingers at maximum range for up to 2.5 seconds, during which he gains invisibility and bonus movement speed.
context_notes: Source notes (summary): Shadow Assault casts a total of 12 blades evenly distributed in all directions.

sources.used_for: canonical champion baseline generation for stats, abilities, and execution metadata

notes: Generated from From Online champion payload as part of champion corpus parity coverage.
Ability execution metadata is source-derived from castTime/speed/effectRadius when present.
This baseline should be manually refined for high-impact simulation nuances before runtime scripting expansion.

schema_notes.base_by_rank: Arrays indexed by ability rank (1-based in game, 0-based in data).
schema_notes.base_by_champion_level: Arrays indexed by champion level minus one.
schema_notes.formula: Formula objects use explicit op/terms/output_stat when reliable source math is available.
schema_notes.ratio_type: Common ratio types: total_ad, bonus_ad, ap, target_max_health, target_missing_health.
schema_notes.value_percent: Percent values are represented as whole percentages unless noted otherwise.
schema_notes.basic_attack: Basic attack timing and projectile defaults are source-derived with documented fallbacks.
schema_notes.basic_attack_raw_timing_stats: Raw timing stats preserve source payload fields for auditability.
